blogs.title: Welcome to my updated hub!
blogs.content: This post was pushed directly from my custom Windows desktop app using the GitHub API!

blogs.title: Website Update
blogs.content: Today I updated the website, added a view more for blogs and statuses, as well as created an app for my computer where I can directly add updates to the blog, status, and comments! Huge W!

blogs.title: Today was hot!
blogs.content: Doing work today, I was suffering. Boiling, even. It was like a high of 97F. I also ran out of water and got a little light-headed. Getting in the truck on the way back home was so nice. The A/C felt amazing. It shouldn't be that hot again for awhile. Thankfully!

blogs.title: Rainy!
blogs.content: Today and yesterday were complete contrasts to the other day in the last blog. The temps dropped 20F, was pretty nice, but it really poured rain. Pretty rough too. We didn't get much done yesterday, but today we finished a lot before the rain started thankfully. We got nearly everything we need done. Which is great! Hopefully it stays this cool and cloudy for next week! Anyway, have a good weekend <3

comments.text: Hewo! Love the new profile page!
